## 🚀 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix
- [ ] 🧹 Code refactor / cleanup
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?

> _Describe the testing you performed manually._

- [ ] Tested on local XAMPP environment
- [ ] Verified on mobile/responsive view
- [ ] No regressions in existing features

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My changes follow the project's code style and conventions
- [ ] I have commented complex code thoroughly
- [ ] All user inputs are validated and sanitized
- [ ] Database queries use prepared statements
- [ ] No secrets or credentials are hardcoded
- [ ] I have updated the documentation if needed
- [ ] I have tested this change locally
